ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受一个介于 0 和 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefix numbers will be padded to that length if they are shorted, i.e. 001 instead of 1
ast.target: 如果前缀数字较短，将被填充至该长度，例如 001 而不是 1

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delimiter between prefix number and title. May be multiple characters.
ast.target: 前缀数字和标题之间的分隔符。可以是多个字符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: RegEx of files and folder to ignore. Eg: ^index\.md$ to ignore index.md files
ast.target: 要忽略的文件和文件夹的正则表达式。例如：^index\\.md$ 用于忽略 index.md 文件

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 将名称修正为排序约定

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The ReactIs.isAsyncMode() alias has been deprecated, and will be removed in React 17+. Update your code to use ReactIs.isConcurrentMode() instead. It has the exact same API.
ast.target: ReactIs.isAsyncMode() 别名已被弃用，并将在 React 17+ 中移除。请更新您的代码以使用 ReactIs.isConcurrentMode()。它具有完全相同的 API。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The ReactIs.isAsyncMode() alias has been deprecated, and will be removed in React 18+.
ast.target: ReactIs.isAsyncMode() 别名已被弃用，并将在 React 18+ 中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The ReactIs.isConcurrentMode() alias has been deprecated, and will be removed in React 18+.
ast.target: ReactIs.isConcurrentMode() 别名已被弃用，并将在 React 18+ 中移除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Prefix min length must be a number above or equal zero.
ast.target: 前缀最小长度必须是一个大于或等于零的数字。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Starting index must be a number above or equal zero.
ast.target: 起始索引必须是一个大于或等于零的数字。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在顶层文件夹中重新排序项目

ast.name: text
ast.source: To reorder files, right click on any file in the file explorer, and click on "Reorder items".
ast.target: 要重新排序文件，请在文件资源管理器中右键单击任何文件，然后单击“重新排序项目”。
